name: canada-aida-ai
description: Canada AIDA (Artificial Intelligence and Data Act) compliance server. Classify AI systems as high-impact or general under AIDA, perform impact assessments, check compliance obligations, crosswalk to EU AI Act, and generate AIDA compliance documentation. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: classify_ai_system
tools.description: Classify an AI system under AIDA as high-impact or general-purpose.

tools.name: impact_assessment
tools.description: Perform an AI impact assessment per AIDA requirements (Sections 7-8).

tools.name: compliance_check
tools.description: Check compliance with AIDA obligations. Evaluates whether a responsible

tools.name: crosswalk_to_eu_ai_act
tools.description: Map AIDA requirements to EU AI Act obligations. Essential for

tools.name: generate_documentation
tools.description: Generate AIDA compliance documentation including public system
